message:
fix: validate From, Subject, and ID in Message.Validate() (gt-bo4nv)

Message.Validate() only checked routing field mutual exclusivity. Now also
validates that ID, From, and Subject are non-empty. Added Validate() call
in sendToSingle as a validation gate before bd create is invoked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -466,6 +466,36 @@ func TestMessageValidate(t *testing.T) {
 			msg:     NewChannelMessage("deacon/", "alerts", "Alert", "Body"),
 			wantErr: false,
 		},
+		{
+			name: "missing ID",
+			msg: &Message{
+				From:    "mayor/",
+				To:      "gastown/Toast",
+				Subject: "Test",
+			},
+			wantErr: true,
+			errMsg:  "must have an ID",
+		},
+		{
+			name: "missing From",
+			msg: &Message{
+				ID:      "msg-001",
+				To:      "gastown/Toast",
+				Subject: "Test",
+			},
+			wantErr: true,
+			errMsg:  "must have a From address",
+		},
+		{
+			name: "missing Subject",
+			msg: &Message{
+				ID:   "msg-001",
+				From: "mayor/",
+				To:   "gastown/Toast",
+			},
+			wantErr: true,
+			errMsg:  "must have a Subject",
+		},
 		{
 			name: "no routing target",
 			msg: &Message{
